data.body: Final rebased stack (onto origin/main 72b6ed8aa) re-voting. 476/478 Verified+1. 474/477 Verified-1 FLAKE: same step 'integration tier (concurrency+reconciler; network-guarded)' failed on macos-latest/py3.13 ONLY (all ubuntu jobs passed; unrelated to code-review changes; same commits pass in 476/478). Local full pre-flight was green (5121 passed). Posted 'recheck' on 474+477 to re-run CI. Waiting for green then submit 478 (atomic). All children+epic already CLOSED.
